original text:
Individual Medical Items | BMK Ventures Inc.
EZ Debride is a single-use disposable sharp debridement instrument in a sterile peel-pack, available in boxes of 8.
DETAILS The Halo Chest Seal is an ultra-sticky hydro-gel occlusive dressing for treatment of penetrating chest trauma.
Each pack includes two seals, allowing for the treatment of entry and exit wounds.
DETAILS A streamlined rapid-access tourniquet case.
MOLLE-compatible.
